_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With stablecoin growth flat and ETF flows diverging sharply from the August 2024 analog, the market lacks the confirmation needed to call a directional break, so the consensus stays in Anxiety's nervous chop until price or flow data resolves the divergence.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls HOLD with low conviction while the narrative writer implies a bullish reversal is forming; the analyst's higher trust weight (7.67 vs 6.00) and self-awareness of their 0% directional track record tips the consensus toward the more cautious stance.
